title: Netherite Upgrade from Piglin bartering
description: Adds Netherite Upgrade to Piglin bartering.
body:
Aquiring Netherite gear while playing on a server became harder after version 1.20, now needing Netherite Upgrade that other players will quickly loot from nearby bastions. 

This datapack adds Netherite Upgrade to Piglin Bartering at ~0.65% chance, so progression is no longer hindered if you are not the first one to enter the Nether.
![Piglin dropping Netherite Upgrade ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7887f11f587cacb39d2450ff8ad67e6ba8735fb.png)

I know it's not ideal solution, because it can prevent going to bastions at all and make players farm Upgrades in easy way using piglin farms, but I think for server purposes it does the job just right.
